title: Vegan Chili
image_alt: Vegan chili with black beans, pinto beans and vegetables

items.name: salt (plus ¼ tsp more at the end)

steps: Set Instant Pot to Sauté. Add olive oil, then onion, bell pepper, carrots, celery, and ½ tsp salt. Stir and cook for 7–10 minutes until softened.
Add garlic, chili powder, cumin, smoked paprika, and oregano. Stir and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the diced tomatoes, black beans, pinto beans, vegetable broth, and bay leaf. Stir to combine. Cancel Sauté, seal the lid, and pressure cook on High for 5 minutes. Quick release.
Discard the bay leaf. Scoop out 1½ cups of chili, blend until smooth, and stir back into the pot — this thickens the chili without losing the chunky texture.
Stir in the cilantro, lime juice, and remaining ¼ tsp salt. Taste and adjust seasoning. Serve with Vegan Cornbread.
